resources.string: You can now use the app. Redirecting…
Sign in to get higher API rate limits and avoid interruptions.
All results are hidden by the 'Hide seen' filter
Restart to apply the new language.
Pure-black background — saves power on OLED screens.
Enter a valid hostname or IP address
Could not resolve host. Check the proxy address.
Could not reach the proxy server.
Are you sure you want to log out?
Check your connection and try again.
GitHub or our backend hit a quota. Try again in a moment.
The repository may be private, renamed, or deleted.
We couldn't load this repo. Use the Retry button below.
Having trouble? Use a Personal Access Token
Sign in with Personal Access Token
Create a Personal Access Token (classic or fine-grained) on any device that can reach GitHub, then paste it below. Needs read access to repositories and your profile.
That doesn't look like a GitHub token. Tokens start with ghp_ or github_pat_.
That token is invalid or has been revoked.
That token doesn't have the required permissions.
Couldn't save token. Please try again.
Check your connection and try again.
Installing version %1$s requires uninstalling the current version (%2$s) first. Your app data will be lost.

The signing certificate for this app has changed since it was first installed.

This could mean the developer rotated their signing key, or the binary may have been tampered with.

Expected: %1$s
Received: %2$s
Failed to discard pending install for %1$s
Failed to fetch from GitHub. Try again.
Installer was saved into the Downloads folder
Install permission blocked by device policy
The APK was downloaded successfully but this device doesn't allow direct installation. Would you like to open it with an external installer?
Use a third-party app to install the APK
Sign in to GitHub for a higher quota.
You've used all %1$d free API requests.
💡 Sign in to get 5,000 requests per hour instead of 60!
Releases are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a bit.
Match your device's font for better readability
You can star a repository from GitHub
You can unstar a repository from GitHub
Sign in with GitHub to see your starred repositories
Star repositories on GitHub with installable releases to see them here
No repositories with installable assets for this platform
Tap to switch between stable releases and beta builds for this app.
Active pre-releases but the project hasn't shipped a stable build in a while. Betas may not converge to a stable release.
No assets associated with this release
There are multiple installable files and application downloaders available for this release. Please review the list and select the one that matches your device requirements.
Unlock the full experience. Manage your apps, sync your preferences, and browse faster.
Your GitHub session has expired or the token was revoked. Please sign in again to continue using authenticated features.
You can still browse as a guest with limited API requests.
This will clear your local session and cached data. To fully revoke access, visit GitHub Settings > Applications.
Please try signing in again to get a new code.
Please check your internet connection and try again.
You denied the authorization request. Try again if this was unintentional.
No GitHub link found in clipboard
This will permanently remove all downloaded APKs and installers (%1$s). You can re-download them anytime.
All downloaded packages have been deleted.
Asks each time. Works on every device.
Install Shizuku to enable silent installs
Start Shizuku to enable silent installs
Shizuku install failed, using standard installer
Silent install via Device Owner — bypasses OEM install prompts
Install Dhizuku and activate it as Device Owner to enable silent installs
Activate Dhizuku as Device Owner to enable silent installs
Silent install via Magisk, KernelSU, or APatch root
Root isn't available on this device. Install Magisk, KernelSU, or APatch first.
Apply downloaded updates without notifying you each time.
Apps can see which installer placed them on your device. By default this is the system shell.
Use a valid Android package name (e.g. com.example.installer)
Some apps detect when their installer changes and may refuse to run, or fail security checks (e.g. Play Integrity, banking apps).
How often to look for new releases.
Look for new releases on a schedule. Turn off to save battery — you can still check manually from any app's details screen.
Your device aggressively kills background tasks. Whitelist Komi Store from battery optimization so scheduled update checks and silent installs can run reliably.
Pick an installed app to link with a GitHub repository
Package name mismatch: the APK is %1$s, but the selected app is %2$s
Signing key mismatch: the APK in this repository was signed by a different developer than the installed app
Pick the APK to verify against your installed app
We don't track GitLab, F-Droid or HTML sources yet.
It doesn't look like a Komi Store or Obtainium export. Here's the start of the file:
No starred repos. Star repos on GitHub to see them here.
Sign in to GitHub to see your starred repos.
GitHub rate limit reached. Resume to keep checking.
Removing a star on GitHub won't untrack the app.
Enter any GitHub username to browse their public starred repositories and add them to your favourites. No sign-in required.
Newly tracked apps include beta builds by default. Already-tracked apps keep their own per-app channel setting (toggle it on the app's Details screen).
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s? This action cannot be undone and app data may be lost.
Drop the parked installer for %1$s and remove the row from your apps list? The downloaded APK will be deleted.
Invalid GitHub URL. Use format: github.com/owner/repo
GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Try again later.
Package mismatch: the APK is %1$s, but the installed app is %2$s. Update blocked.
Signing key mismatch: the update was signed by a different developer. Update blocked.
Controls the maximum column width of the details screen (desktop)
Manage repositories you hid from Home and Search.
Long-press a repository card on Home or Search to hide it from discovery.
Only assets matching this pattern (regex) will be installed. Useful for monorepos that ship multiple apps.
No installable assets in this release
Walk back through past releases until one matches the filter. Required for monorepos where the latest release belongs to a sibling app.
Configure how this app is matched in the repository. Use these settings when the repo ships multiple apps.
Type a filter to preview matching assets.
No releases in the recent window contain matching assets. Try enabling fallback to older releases or adjusting the regex.
Could not load preview. Check your connection and try again.
Pick which APK variant should be installed for updates. The choice is remembered across releases.
No installable assets in the latest release.
This release has no version-tagged variants to pin. The automatic picker will continue choosing the best asset for your device.
Could not load variants. Check your connection and try again.
Could not save your choice. Try again.
Let Komi Store pick the best variant for your device
Variant changed — tap Update to pick again
Future updates will prefer the %1$s variant. Change this anytime in app settings.
Future updates will prefer this variant. Change this anytime in app settings.
Variant unpinned. Updates will use the automatic picker.
The filter decides which assets are considered. The variant pin decides which of those assets gets installed.
Choose the service used to translate README content.
Google works globally without configuration. Youdao works from mainland China but requires API credentials from Youdao's developer portal.
Sign up at ai.youdao.com to get your App Key and App Secret. The free tier is enough for casual use.
Works out of the box via the public Disroot mirror — leave fields empty to use it. For more privacy, paste your own self-hosted URL. API key only needed if the instance requires one.
Sign up at deepl.com/pro-api. Free tier keys end with :fx and use the free endpoint automatically. Pro tier keeps your text private; Free tier may use submitted text to improve models.
Azure Translator is privacy-respecting (No-Trace by default — your text is never stored or used for training). Free tier covers 2M characters/month. Region is only needed for non-global resources.
Region (e.g. westeurope, leave empty for Global)
Skipped %1$d — you can re-run a scan from Settings.
Couldn't find any GitHub apps on this device.
This means either everything was installed via a different store, or we don't have visibility into what's installed.

We can scan your installed apps and match them to GitHub releases — so updates and detection just work.

To do that, we need to see which apps you have. Without permission we can only see about 5 apps; with it, we can see all of them.

We never send the list of your apps anywhere without your permission. The match runs on your device. The optional backend lookup sends only the package name and app label, and when available the signing fingerprint, install source, and any GitHub-repo hint declared in the app's manifest — never a full list of what's installed.
Review them to track updates here.
Couldn't link this app — try again.
Couldn't reach GitHub. Try again later.
Paste a github.com URL or search…
We recognized them with high confidence. You can undo individual matches from each app's details, or undo all now.
Don't see your app? Add manually
Add an app from another store
We'll stop tracking %1$s as installed from this repo. The app stays on your device — only the link is removed.
Unlinked. We'll re-suggest a match next scan.
Manually linked — verified by you. Unlink to re-scan.
You just refreshed this — try again in %1$ds.
Refresh service is busy — try again in %1$ds.
This repository is archived on GitHub.
This repository no longer exists on GitHub.
Enter the hostname of a Forgejo or Gitea instance (e.g. git.example.com). GHS will accept URLs from these hosts in the manual-link sheet.
Codeberg, gitea.com and git.disroot.org are already searched by default — you don't need to add them here. Use this list only for your own self-hosted Forgejo or Gitea.
Used for downloading release assets. GitHub API calls always go direct. Most users should leave this on Direct GitHub.
All mirrors broken? You can host your own in 5 minutes — see docs.
%1$s is no longer available, switched to Direct GitHub.
Review or update everything at once.
Select any app on the left to see its details and actions.
Tap any card on the left to view its details here.
Render this page in another language.
App settings, theme, network, translation, advanced options.
Filter Home feed to specific platforms. Leave all off to see everything.
Some changes need a restart to apply.
Silent installers and installer attribution are Android features. Desktop installs go through the OS package manager.
This screen is part of the in-progress redesign. The settings still work — they're just being moved here from the old layout.
Permissions, signing, components — see exactly what an APK declares.
Nothing to inspect for this app yet.
Debuggable build — sketchy if this is a release.
Skipped %1$s — you'll be notified when a newer version arrives
When you skip an update on the apps screen, the entry will show up here so you can revert it.
Google's developer-verification policy threatens open Android distribution. Komi Store stands with the coalition.
Translate README and release notes automatically when opening a repository. Uses your app language as the target.
Personal access tokens per forge host (GitHub, Codeberg, Forgejo)
Tap + to add a personal access token
Leave blank to keep the existing token. Type a new value to replace it.
You're signed in to GitHub via the app — that's the recommended path. Add a token here only if browser sign-in won't work (restrictive network, no browser) or for forges other than GitHub.
How the app reaches the internet
Pick a connection mode below. Most people leave this on No proxy.
Each scope uses the main connection by default. Choose 'Custom' to keep its own settings.
Applies to all traffic unless overridden below.
Paste a full proxy URL and we'll fill the form for you.
Where the app looks for repositories
The app searches GitHub by default. Route through a regional mirror or add custom Forgejo / Gitea hosts.
Add a Forgejo or Gitea host
When you copy a github.com or codeberg.org link, we'll prompt to open it.
Skip seen repos in feeds and search.
Forget which repos you've already opened.
This won't unstar or unfavorite anything.
Repos you've muted from feeds and search.
We keep installers around so updates resume fast.
Cross-platform app store for GitHub, Codeberg, and Forgejo releases.
The app restarts when you switch language.
Komi Store stands on these libraries.
Tap any entry to open its project page.
Four palettes × Light, Dark, AMOLED, System.
Stars, profile, and rate-limit headroom. Optional — skip to browse anonymously.
Both optional. You can flip these later in Tweaks.
Required to install APKs outside Play
Couldn't save the host. Try again.
Couldn't remove the host. Try again.
